$comment: Anna Executa tool manifest for Meeting AI. NOTE: the exact Executa schema was not publicly documented at build time — field names here are best-effort and may need to be aligned to Anna's real executa.json spec. The tool entrypoint (cli.mjs) and tool contracts are implemented and runnable today.
name: meeting-ai
description: Live meeting copilot: detects questions in a transcript, answers them, and summarizes the meeting — running on Anna's hosted LLM, no personal API key required.

tools.name: detect_question
tools.description: Determine whether a transcript chunk contains a real question.

tools.name: answer_question
tools.description: Answer a detected question using the meeting context.

tools.name: summarize_meeting
tools.description: Summarize a full transcript into a summary, decisions, action items and a follow-up email.
